title: Planetoid
body:
# This is a refreshed version of TeNNoX'es Planetoids mod

https://tennoxmods.blogspot.com/p/planetoid.html

 

### It adds features such as:
- Possibility to choose if the floor under the world should be made of water or empty space to the void
- Config for planets probabilities spawning
 

#### I also have some Future plans:
- Fix spawning in the void/water on low spawntries?
- Different wood type planets(configurable like stone planets)
- Nether[maybe End] dimensions as planetoids
- ~~[1.12.2/1.14.4 versions]~~ Fabric(or Forge) 1.18 rewrite
- More customization options for the planets and GUI in the menu for the planet probability instead of the config file
- Villages & Strongholds Spawning? [maybe as special Planet types]
 

(But im by no means a pro modder, im not well known with Java, I code games in Unity(C#), and I just followed tutorials from youtube(that were hard to find because 1.7.10 is so outdated) )

**Im a gamedeveloper, if you're interested check out my webpage https://hypergamesdev.github.io**

 

planetoid planetoids survival sky skyblock
